rules._comment: Datadog path: disk-used % via clickhouse.disks.free_space/total_space custom_queries (see datadog/common/main.tf). Prometheus path: ClickHouse's native /metrics endpoint exposes DiskUsed_default/DiskTotal_default as async metrics (ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_ prefix); disk name is baked into the metric name (single 'default' disk). Metric names verified live against system.asynchronous_metrics on 2026-07-07.

annotations.description: Warn when ClickHouse disk usage exceeds 80%; critical at 90%. Recovery at 75% (warn) / 85% (critical).

datadog.message: ClickHouse disk {{disk_name.name}} on {{host.name}} (cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}) has exceeded disk usage thresholds (warn 80%, critical 90%).

rules._comment: P0: complete ingestion halt — no rows inserted for 5 min. Datadog path uses clickhouse.table.insert.row.total.as_count(). Prometheus path: ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertedRows is a monotonic counter on the native /metrics endpoint; increase(...[5m]) summed across replicas gives cluster row deltas, so <1 means no inserts. Metric name verified live against system.events on 2026-07-07.

annotations.description: No rows have been inserted into ClickHouse for 5 minutes — possible ingestion pipeline halt.

datadog.message: ClickHouse on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}} has had zero row insertions for the past 5 minutes. Check the ingestion pipeline (Kafka consumer, OTel collector, or upstream producers).

rules._comment: P1: ingestion delay exceeds SLA — delayed inserts building up for 10+ min. Datadog path uses clickhouse.query.insert.delayed. Prometheus path: ClickHouseMetrics_DelayedInserts is a current gauge on the native /metrics endpoint counting INSERTs queued/delayed by back-pressure (e.g. max_insert_delay_ms); sustained non-zero = SLA back-pressure. Metric name verified live against system.metrics on 2026-07-07.

annotations.description: ClickHouse has delayed INSERT queries — back-pressure may be causing ingestion delay exceeding SLA.

datadog.message: ClickHouse on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}} has delayed INSERT queries for 10+ minutes. Investigate ingestion pipeline back-pressure.

rules._comment: P2: minor ingestion slowdown — insert row rate slightly below baseline. Datadog path uses clickhouse.table.insert.row.total. Prometheus path: increase(ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertedRows[15m]) summed across replicas, below a per-env threshold, indicates a slowdown not yet causing delays. Threshold (rows per 15m) needs env calibration; placeholder warn 50 / crit 10. Metric name verified live against system.events on 2026-07-07.

annotations.description: ClickHouse insert row rate is running below the expected baseline — minor slowdown, not yet at SLA breach. Threshold needs env-specific calibration.

datadog.message: ClickHouse on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}} insert rate is below the minor slowdown threshold. No immediate action required but monitor for escalation.

rules._comment: P0: any insert/write failure. Datadog path uses clickhouse.log.messages.error.total. Prometheus path: ClickHouseProfileEvents_LogError is the native /metrics monotonic counter of all ClickHouse error-level log messages — not insert-specific, but the most direct write-failure signal without a custom query. increase(...[5m]) summed > 0 means any new error. NOTE: FailedInsertQuery/FailedQuery events do NOT appear until they fire (zero-count events are hidden), so LogError is the reliably-present signal; verified live against system.events on 2026-07-07.

annotations.description: ClickHouse is logging errors — possible insert/write failures. Investigate immediately.

datadog.message: ClickHouse on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}} is logging errors. Check system.query_log for insert/write failures.
